name: orqis
description: Context visibility for LLMs and agents

scripts.dev: npm run build && node dist/cli.js inspect fixtures/openai-request.json
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js inspect fixtures/openai-request.json && node dist/cli.js diff fixtures/turn-1.json fixtures/turn-2.json && node dist/cli.js budget fixtures/anthropic-request.json --model claude-3-5-sonnet-latest && node dist/cli.js agent-report fixtures/agent-snapshot.json
